title: Spring
content:
In the spring the housemaid's fancy
        Lightly turns from pot and pan
     To the greater necromancy
        Of a young unmarried man.
     You can hold her through the winter,
        And she'll work around and sing,
     But it's just as good as certain
        She will marry in the spring.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Spring", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
